{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Ornheim golem
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An [[Ornheim golem]] is animated and controlled by a carved gem called a heartstone.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An [[Ornheim golem]] can be destroyed by brute force if its body is broken.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
